metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Audit Event ASIM filtering parser for SQLSecurityAudit Logs
properties.query:
let parser=(
  starttime:datetime=datetime(null), 
  endtime:datetime=datetime(null),
  srcipaddr_has_any_prefix:dynamic=dynamic([]), 
  eventresult:string='*',
  actorusername_has_any:dynamic=dynamic([]),
  eventtype_in:dynamic=dynamic([]),
  operation_has_any:dynamic=dynamic([]),
  object_has_any:dynamic=dynamic([]),
  newvalue_has_any:dynamic=dynamic([]),
  disabled:bool = false
){
  let SqlAuditEventTypeLookup = datatable (ActionType:string, EventType:string)
  [
    "SELECT", "Read",
    "EXECUTE", "Execute",
    "INSERT", "Create",
    "UPDATE", "Set",
    "DELETE", "Delete",
    "CREATE", "Create",
    "ALTER", "Set",
    "DROP", "Delete",
    "GRANT", "Set",
    "DENY", "Set",
    "REVOKE", "Set",
    "BATCH", "Execute",
    "LOGIN", "Execute",
    "LOGOUT", "Execute",
    "ENABLE", "Enable",
    "DISABLE", "Disable",
    "BACKUP", "Read",
    "RESTORE", "Set",
    "RENAME", "Set",
    "TRUNCATE", "Delete",
    "OPEN", "Execute",
    "CLOSE", "Execute",
    "FETCH", "Read",
    "RECEIVE", "Read"
  ];
  let SqlSecurityAuditDedicated = 
    SQLSecurityAuditEvents
    | where not(disabled)
    | where
        (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
        and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
        and (array_length(newvalue_has_any) == 0)
    | where
        (array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0 or has_any_ipv4_prefix(ClientIp, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix))
        and (array_length(actorusername_has_any) == 0 or ServerPrincipalName has_any (actorusername_has_any))
        and (array_length(operation_has_any) == 0 or ActionName has_any (operation_has_any))
        and (array_length(object_has_any) == 0 or ObjectName has_any (object_has_any))
    | project-rename
        EventOriginalType = ActionName
    | extend
        SrcIpAddr = iff(isnotnull(parse_ipv4(ClientIp)), ClientIp, ""),
        EventOriginalUid = tostring(EventId),
        ActorUsername = ServerPrincipalName,
        ActorUserId = tostring(ServerPrincipalSid),
        Object = ObjectName,
        Operation = EventOriginalType,
        ActorSessionId = tostring(SessionId),
        EventResult = iff(Succeeded == true, "Success", "Failure"),
        TargetAppName = strcat(LogicalServerName, "/", DatabaseName),
        AdditionalInfo = bag_pack(
            "Statement", Statement,
            "SchemaName", SchemaName,
            "DurationMs", DurationMs,
            "AffectedRows", AffectedRows,
            "ResponseRows", ResponseRows,
            "ApplicationName", ApplicationName,
            "ClassTypeDescription", ClassTypeDescription,
            "HostName", HostName
        )
    ;
  let SqlSecurityAuditDiag =
    AzureDiagnostics
    | where not(disabled)
    | where Category == "SQLSecurityAuditEvents"
    | where
        (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
        and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
        and (array_length(newvalue_has_any) == 0)
    | where
        (array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0 or has_any_ipv4_prefix(client_ip_s, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix))
        and (array_length(actorusername_has_any) == 0 or server_principal_name_s has_any (actorusername_has_any))
        and (array_length(operation_has_any) == 0 or action_name_s has_any (operation_has_any))
        and (array_length(object_has_any) == 0 or object_name_s has_any (object_has_any))
    | project-rename
        EventOriginalType = action_name_s
    | extend
        SrcIpAddr = iff(isnotnull(parse_ipv4(client_ip_s)), client_ip_s, ""),
        EventOriginalUid = tostring(event_id_g),
        ActorUsername = server_principal_name_s,
        ActorUserId = tostring(server_principal_sid_s),
        Object = object_name_s,
        Operation = EventOriginalType,
        ActorSessionId = tostring(session_id_d),
        EventResult = iff(succeeded_s == "true", "Success", "Failure"),
        TargetAppName = strcat(LogicalServerName_s, "/", database_name_s),
        AdditionalInfo = bag_pack(
            "Statement", statement_s,
            "SchemaName", schema_name_s,
            "DurationMs", duration_milliseconds_d,
            "AffectedRows", affected_rows_d,
            "ResponseRows", response_rows_d,
            "ApplicationName", application_name_s,
            "ClassTypeDescription", class_type_description_s,
            "HostName", host_name_s
        )
    ;
  union isfuzzy=true SqlSecurityAuditDedicated, SqlSecurityAuditDiag
  | extend
      EventCount = int(1),
      EventStartTime = TimeGenerated,
      EventEndTime = TimeGenerated,
      EventProduct = "SQL Audit Logs",
      EventVendor = "Microsoft",
      EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.2",
      EventSchema = "AuditEvent",
      TargetAppType = "SaaS application",
      ObjectType = "Cloud Resource",
      ActorUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(ActorUsername), "Simple", ""),
      ActorUserIdType = iff(isnotempty(ActorUserId), "SID", ""),
      EventSeverity = iff(EventResult == "Failure", "Low", "Informational")
  // Filter by eventresult
  | where eventresult == "*" or (EventResult == eventresult)
  // Map EventType from action name
  | extend ActionType = toupper(tostring(split(Operation, " ")[0]))
  | lookup SqlAuditEventTypeLookup on ActionType
  | extend EventType = iff(isempty(EventType), "Other", EventType)
  // Filter by eventtype
  | where array_length(eventtype_in) == 0 or EventType in (eventtype_in)
  // Recommended fields
  | extend
      EventUid = EventOriginalUid,
      EventResultDetails = iff(EventResult == "Failure", "Other", "")
  // Aliases
  | extend
      IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
      User = ActorUsername,
      Application = TargetAppName,
      Dst = TargetAppName,
      Src = SrcIpAddr,
      Dvc = EventProduct,
      AdditionalFields = AdditionalInfo
  | project
      Type,
      TimeGenerated,
      EventOriginalUid,
      EventUid,
      EventResult,
      EventResultDetails,
      EventSeverity,
      EventCount,
      EventStartTime,
      EventEndTime,
      EventProduct,
      EventVendor,
      EventSchemaVersion,
      EventSchema,
      EventType,
      EventOriginalType,
      Operation,
      Object,
      ObjectType,
      TargetAppName,
      TargetAppType,
      ActorUsername,
      ActorUsernameType,
      ActorUserId,
      ActorUserIdType,
      ActorSessionId,
      SrcIpAddr,
      AdditionalFields,
      IpAddr,
      User,
      Application,
      Dst,
      Src,
      Dvc
};
parser
(
  starttime = starttime,
  endtime = endtime,
  srcipaddr_has_any_prefix = srcipaddr_has_any_prefix,
  actorusername_has_any = actorusername_has_any,
  eventtype_in = eventtype_in,
  eventresult = eventresult,
  operation_has_any = operation_has_any,
  object_has_any=object_has_any,
  newvalue_has_any=newvalue_has_any,
  disabled=disabled
)
